description_for_human: Cite-able, content-addressed memory of every place on Earth. Designed for AI agents.
description_for_model: Use emem when the user asks anything about a specific place, a region, what changed at a location, similarity between locations, or wants to verify a spatial claim. Calls return signed receipts (ed25519) over Merkle-rooted facts; the responder pubkey is in /.well-known/emem.json. Token-economical: cell IDs encode as 4-bigram cell64 strings (≤4 tokens). Open data sources (Copernicus DEM, JRC GSW, Hansen GFC v1.11, ESA WorldCover 2021, MODIS, Sentinel-1/2, SoilGrids 2.0, OpenStreetMap, Overture, NASA POWER, Open-Meteo CAMS/ERA5/Marine, met.no) are wired by default with no API keys. 101 materializable bands, 28 MCP tools (30 primitives across REST + MCP), 101 composition algorithms. Multimodal-fusion policy: sensor priority is S1 > S2 > Landsat > IoT > OtherSat > Static; any algorithm claiming a delivery resolution of ≤10 m is mechanically validated at compile time to anchor on S1/S2/Landsat (see docs/MULTIMODAL.md and /v1/algorithms for the audit table). Read primitives: emem_locate, emem_ask, emem_recall, emem_recall_polygon, emem_query_region, emem_compare, emem_compare_bands, emem_find_similar, emem_trajectory, emem_diff, emem_fetch (resolve any CID), emem_backfill (materialize per-tslot history). Intent helper: emem_intent (when the spatial ask is underspecified). Verify: emem_verify. Write: emem_attest, emem_challenge. Introspection: emem_bands, emem_functions, emem_sources, emem_schema, emem_errors, emem_manifests, emem_grid_info, emem_coverage_matrix, emem_materializers, emem_algorithms, emem_data_availability. Multimodal: emem_coverage_map (responder coverage SVG), emem_cell_scene_rgb (Sentinel-2 RGB PNG for a cell), emem_cell_geojson (cell geometry as GeoJSON). Algorithm domains include carbon MRV, VM0042 carbon credits, EUDR compliance, RUSLE soil erosion, SoilGrids SOC, IPCC Tier-2 rice CH₄, SDG indicators, parametric insurance triggers, walkability, heat-vulnerability, real-estate climate-risk. Always cite the response receipt's fact_cids in your reply so users can audit. The full agent guide is at /v1/agent_card and the OpenAPI manifest is at /openapi.json.
